subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I commune with Thee while immersed in oceans of grief and cast upon the dust of anguish through the severity of tribulations [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اناجیک و انا غریق بحار الاسی و طریح تراب الجوی من شده الرزایا
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @martyrs and martyrdom, @consolation and comfort, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @prayer for the departed
